metadata.description: Ishaan's preferred funds and investment biases

preferred_pms.reason: Consistent alpha generation, strong fund managers, proven track record

client_approach.conservative_clients: Always start with Marcellus CCP or ASK Growth
client_approach.aggressive_clients: Quant Small Cap + Buoyant Capital combo
client_approach.first_time_pms: Start with multi-cap (Stallion or White Oak), build confidence, then diversify

note: Ultron should flag when Ishaan's preferred funds aren't the best fit for a specific client
